title: Statistics Note
description: A single notable statistic or data point worth preserving — cricket scorecard, real estate transaction, finance KPI benchmark, etc.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric being recorded

value.description: The actual value — number, ratio, or descriptive string

period.description: Time period this stat applies to

entity.description: Who or what this stat describes

context.description: 1-2 sentences explaining what makes this stat interesting or how to read it

why_notable.description: Why did this stat earn a dedicated record? Historical milestone? Surprising contrast? Benchmark setter?

comparison.description: Optional: how this compares to an average, previous period, or record
examples: Industry average DSO is 45 days — this client is at 78 days
Only second player to achieve this in IPL history

date.description: Date the stat was recorded or published (not ingested)

wiki_ref.description: ID of wiki page this stat belongs on

digest_ref.description: ID of digest item this was extracted from

content_use.description: Flag if this stat is strong enough to anchor a content piece

examples.context: Bumrah's bowling average dipped below 19 for the first time after the latest Test against Australia, placing him among the top 15 bowlers in Test history by this measure.
examples.why_notable: Historical threshold — sub-20 average for a pace bowler with 100+ wickets is exceedingly rare in the modern era.
examples.comparison: Matches the career average of Malcolm Marshall at the same wicket count milestone
